start.title: No Reservations: The Afterlife Tour
start.text: Chef Anthony appears in the quiet glow of the city night. With me, every meal tells a story. Let's travel the world, taste incredible food, and discover the cultures behind every table. Where would you like to go first?

choices.text: Istanbul, Turkey
Tokyo, Japan
New Orleans, USA
Mexico City, Mexico

istanbul.title: Istanbul, Turkey
istanbul.text: The scent of grilled fish, warm bread, and strong tea drifts through the air as Chef Anthony leads you through the city's glowing streets. "A city split between continents learns how to hold contradictions," he says.

choices.text: Follow him to the spice market
Take the ferry across the Bosphorus
Sit down for tea and conversation

istanbul_market.title: The Spice Market
istanbul_market.text: Colors spill from every stall. Saffron, sumac, mint, and dried fruit crowd the air with sweetness and heat. Anthony smiles. "A market teaches you what a city values."

choices.text: Taste street simit from a nearby cart
Ask a vendor about the strongest spice

istanbul_ferry.title: Across the Water
istanbul_ferry.text: The ferry cuts across dark water as gulls circle overhead. Anthony leans against the rail. "Some meals stay with you because of the food. Others stay because of where you were standing when life felt bigger."

istanbul_tea.title: Tea by the Window
istanbul_tea.text: You sit in a quiet café while tea glasses glow amber under the light. Anthony watches the room. "The best places never rush you. They let the city come to you."

choices.text: Ask him what makes a meal unforgettable
Stay silent and listen to the room

istanbul_simit.title: Bread and Morning Air
istanbul_simit.text: You tear into warm simit while the street wakes around you. It is simple and perfect. Anthony laughs. "Anyone can chase luxury. It takes taste to respect something humble."

istanbul_vendor.title: Too Much of a Good Thing
istanbul_vendor.text: The vendor hands you a pepper so intense your eyes water instantly. Anthony tries not to laugh, but fails. "Curiosity is good," he says, "but arrogance has a flavor too."

istanbul_meal.title: A Table Worth Remembering
istanbul_meal.text: "It has to tell the truth," Anthony says. "About the place. About the people. About whoever cooked it." Outside, the call to prayer rolls through the city like another heartbeat.

istanbul_listen.title: The City Speaks for Itself
istanbul_listen.text: Spoons tap glass. Chairs scrape softly. Someone laughs near the counter. For a while, nobody says anything. Somehow it feels like the right ending.

tokyo.title: Tokyo, Japan
tokyo.text: Neon lights reflect off rain-slick streets as you follow Chef Anthony into a narrow ramen alley hidden behind the crowds. "Tokyo rewards attention," he says. "Blink and you'll miss the whole point."

choices.text: Enter the tiny ramen shop
Walk into a late-night convenience store
Follow him into a hidden sushi bar

tokyo_ramen.title: Steam and Silence
tokyo_ramen.text: You duck into a ramen shop with only seven seats. Nobody talks much. The broth is rich, deep, and almost impossible to describe. Anthony nods. "Some places don't need to impress you. They already know who they are."

tokyo_konbini.title: Bright Lights, Small Wonders
tokyo_konbini.text: Inside the convenience store, everything is neat, quick, and strangely comforting. Anthony picks up a packaged sandwich and grins. "Never underestimate a culture that takes even convenience seriously."

choices.text: Try the egg sandwich
Grab a strange mystery snack

tokyo_sushi.title: Twelve Seats, No Menu
tokyo_sushi.text: The sushi bar is quiet except for the sound of knives and soft greetings. You sit down and let the chef decide your meal. Anthony smiles. "Trust is part of the experience."

choices.text: Trust the chef completely
Ask too many questions about every bite

tokyo_egg.title: Unexpected Excellence
tokyo_egg.text: It should not be this good, but somehow it is. Anthony laughs under his breath. "That's the trap. Once you notice care, you start expecting it everywhere."

tokyo_snack.title: A Risky Choice
tokyo_snack.text: The packaging is adorable. The flavor is not. Anthony watches your expression collapse and just says, "Now you know."

tokyo_trust.title: The Best Seat in the City
tokyo_trust.text: Piece after piece arrives with perfect timing. No music, no spectacle, no wasted motion. Anthony looks almost peaceful. "The world gets loud," he says. "Skill like this doesn't have to."

tokyo_questions.title: You Broke the Spell
tokyo_questions.text: The chef stays polite, but the room changes. Anthony gives you a look that says you talked your way out of something beautiful.

new_orleans.title: New Orleans, USA
new_orleans.text: Warm night air wraps around you as jazz spills through the streets. The smell of spice, butter, and sugar hangs in the air. Chef Anthony smiles. 'Some cities survive by becoming unforgettable. New Orleans is one of them.'

choices.text: Follow the scent of gumbo
Follow the trumpet into a jazz club
Ask why this city matters so much

nola_gumbo.title: The Gumbo Pot
nola_gumbo.text: A woman stirs a massive pot with practiced patience. Chef Anthony leans close. 'Good food takes time. So do people worth knowing.'

nola_jazz.title: After Midnight
nola_jazz.text: Inside a crowded club, strangers dance like old friends. Chef Anthony laughs. 'Some people wait for permission to feel alive. Never do that.'

nola_talk.title: Street Corner Wisdom
nola_talk.text: He watches the street quietly. 'Because this place knows grief,' he says. 'And it still chose music.'

mexico_city.title: Mexico City, Mexico
mexico_city.text: The city hums around you as tacos sizzle on the grill and Chef Anthony smiles, telling you the best meals are often found standing up on a busy corner. "A city this alive doesn't introduce itself slowly," he says.

choices.text: Follow the smell of tacos al pastor
Walk into a crowded market
Sit down for late-night churros and chocolate

mexico_tacos.title: The Spinning Trompo
mexico_tacos.text: The cook slices pork from the trompo with fast, careful movements. Pineapple drops perfectly onto the tortilla. Anthony grins. "Some of the greatest meals on earth are eaten standing up with grease on your hands."

choices.text: Take the extra hot salsa
Keep it simple and enjoy the balance

mexico_market.title: Rows of Color
mexico_market.text: Fruit, flowers, chilies, and music seem to collide all at once. Anthony moves slowly, taking it in. "A market is a city's memory," he says. "Everything important eventually passes through one."

mexico_churros.title: Sugar at Midnight
mexico_churros.text: The chocolate is thick, the churros are still hot, and the whole table goes quiet for a second. Anthony nods. "Dessert isn't an afterthought in a city that knows how to live."

choices.text: Ask him what travel is really for
Order one more plate even though you're full

mexico_salsa.title: Respect the Heat
mexico_salsa.text: You try to act unfazed, but the salsa hits like fire. Anthony laughs immediately. "Confidence is cheap. Taste has to be earned."

mexico_balance.title: The Perfect Bite
mexico_balance.text: The sweetness, smoke, salt, and acid all land together at once. For a second, the street disappears around you. Anthony just points at the taco and says, "That's it. That's why we go."

mexico_travel.title: A Better Kind of Hunger
mexico_travel.text: "Not to collect places," Anthony says. "To let them change you a little." The city keeps moving around you while the thought stays still.

mexico_full.title: One Plate Too Many
mexico_full.text: The second plate seemed like a good idea five minutes ago. Now even Anthony looks concerned. "A good traveler knows when the meal is over," he says.
